column1: # Maple Insight — Language Test Cost Data (US-3.5)
# Source:         Official test-registration portals for IELTS (IDP / British Council),
#                 TEF Canada (CCIP / lefrancaisdesaffaires.fr), and CELPIP (Paragon Testing).
#                 Where a country has no local test centre for IELTS/TEF/TCF/CELPIP, the
#                 languageTestCAD column is left empty (null); the engine helper falls back
#                 to the ZZ default for that field at runtime.
# Currency:       All fees converted to CAD using the Bank of Canada noon rate 2026-04-10.
# Test coverage:  IELTS is the primary test for all English-language applicants.
#                 TEF Canada is the primary test for Francophone Express Entry applicants (FR).
#                 IELTS / CELPIP is noted for US where CELPIP is locally available.
#                 TCF Canada is an accepted alternative to TEF Canada but is not used as
#                 primary for any country in this dataset (same French test-centre network).
# isSeeded flag:  This script patches language fields and then atomically flips isSeeded=true
#                 for all 25 documents once all language patches succeed.

column4: languageTestSource
column7: notes

column4: languageTestSource
column7: notes

column4: IDP IELTS India — exam registration fee; retrieved 2026-04-10
column7: IELTS available at IDP and British Council centres across India. CELPIP not locally available.

column4: British Council Brazil — IELTS registration fee; retrieved 2026-04-10
column7: IELTS available at British Council centres in Sao Paulo and Rio. CELPIP not locally available. TEF/TCF available for Francophone track but rarely used.

column4: CCIP — TEF Canada exam fee (EUR 199); retrieved 2026-04-10
column7: TEF Canada used as primary test for Francophone Express Entry applicants. TCF Canada (France Education International) is an accepted alternative at comparable cost. IELTS also available.

column4: British Council UK — IELTS registration fee (GBP 195); retrieved 2026-04-10
column7: IELTS widely available across the UK. CELPIP not locally available. GBP 195 ≈ CAD 340; used CAD 300 as blended mid-range estimate.

column4: British Council UAE — IELTS registration fee (AED 820); retrieved 2026-04-10
column7: IELTS available at British Council Abu Dhabi and Dubai. CELPIP / TEF / TCF not locally available. AED 820 ≈ CAD 300; used CAD 290 conservative.

column4: IDP IELTS USA — exam registration fee (USD 235); retrieved 2026-04-10
column7: Both IELTS (USD 235) and CELPIP (USD 280) available. Used USD 235 IELTS as primary; blended to CAD 300. TEF/TCF available at Alliance Française centres for Francophone track.

column4: British Council Ukraine — IELTS registration fee; retrieved 2026-04-10
column7: IELTS available at British Council Kyiv. CELPIP / TEF / TCF not locally available. Wartime disruptions may affect test centre availability; used pre-disruption fee as conservative estimate.

column4: British Council Romania — IELTS registration fee; retrieved 2026-04-10
column7: IELTS available at British Council Bucharest. CELPIP not locally available. TEF/TCF available at Institut Français for Francophone track.
